notes.en: [[character:xilonen]]'s main job is to decrease Elemental Resistances of opponents using her Samplers. This, paired alongside the ability to hold [[set:scroll]] **(4)**, makes her a great asset to many teams.

[[character:xilonen]]'s [[ability:burst]] will heal the active character at intervals if 2 or more of her Samplers had their elemental types changed. Otherwise, she will deal additional instances of [[element:geo]]]] DMG.

The resistance shredding from the Samplers occurs when [[character:xilonen]] is paired with **2+ PHEC ([[element:pyro]]/[[element:hydro]]/[[element:electro]]/[[element:cryo]])** members. To activate them, press [[ability:skill]], and continuously [[ability:na]] until her [[ability:nightsoul-point]]s are full. This takes 2 or 3 [[ability:na]]s to do.
At **[C2]**, [[character:xilonen]]'s [[element:geo]] Samplers are always active, enabling her to be added in teams with 2 or more [[element:geo]] members already present.
